text.message: I know how OWS works, blue doesn't have wheat
this isn't the strongest OWS with essentially one wheat
how is that 1 wheat ? at 6 and 11 production
i didn't see your question earlier
you have road, oj has army I get it
maybe balance the robs a bit
it'd be more fun if black gets both
black and red are not winning
count the number of cities needed to win without army or road
that's wrong, I can't win without army or road
you are competing with oj, blue
black goes road, knight, settle, vp for 9
dream on, black doesn't have the production, stop deflecting
2 cities and 3 down devs, 1 is non knight at least
i wasn't deflecting, there wasn't much talk of me to deflect
you are at 9 with road, blue
when u have 9 brick 4 and 10 wood
black doesn't have the road production, you need 2 roads to connect
interesting that oj is going for a road :)
